user.title: Connect to YoLink Local Hub
user.description: Enter your YoLink Local Hub credentials. If the hub is connected by both Ethernet and Wi-Fi, set the second address as an optional fallback.

data_description.hub_ip: The hub address normally used by Home Assistant, for example the Ethernet hostname or IP address.
data_description.secondary_hub_ip: Optional fallback address for the same hub, typically the Wi-Fi hostname or IP address when the primary address is Ethernet, or the Ethernet address when the primary address is Wi-Fi.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure YoLink Local Hub
reconfigure.description: Enter your YoLink Local Hub credentials. If the hub is connected by both Ethernet and Wi-Fi, set the second address as an optional fallback.

data_description.hub_ip: The hub address normally used by Home Assistant, for example the Ethernet hostname or IP address.
data_description.secondary_hub_ip: Optional fallback address for the same hub, typically the Wi-Fi hostname or IP address when the primary address is Ethernet, or the Ethernet address when the primary address is Wi-Fi.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the hub
